def negative_boolean_flag_parameter_controls_unrelated_behaviors():
    rule_id = "boolean_flag_parameter_controls_unrelated_behaviors"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag parameters whose boolean value switches between materially different behaviors instead of selecting clear separate entrypoints."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
